fundamentals.name: AppLovin Corporation
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: AppLovin Corporation provides end-to-end artificial intelligence-powered advertising solutions for businesses in the United States and internationally. It operates through two segments, Advertising and Apps. The company offers Axon Ads Manager, a suite of marketing solutions that enables developers to automate, optimize, and manage marketing efforts; MAX, an in-app bidding technology that optimizes the value of a publisher's advertising inventory by running a real-time competitive auction; Adjust, a measurement and analytics marketing platform; and Wurl, a connected TV platform, which distributes streaming video for content companies, provides advertising and publishing solutions. It serves individuals, small and independent businesses, enterprises, advertisers and advertising networks, mobile app publishers, and indie studio developers. The company was incorporated in 2011 and is headquartered in Palo Alto, California.

judgment.summary: AppLovin Corporation exhibits exceptional growth and profitability metrics, though it carries a significant debt load relative to its equity.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimates by 3.4%; next earnings date is 2026-08-05.
positives: Revenue growth 59.0% YoY and earnings growth 113.1% YoY demonstrate robust top and bottom-line expansion.
Exceptional margins with Gross margin at 88.4%, Operating margin at 78.2%, and Profit margin at 64.3%.
High returns on equity (266.4%) and assets (44.2%) indicate efficient capital utilization.
Strong free cash flow of $3.18B TTM supports operations and potential debt reduction.
Analyst consensus is a strong buy with a mean target price significantly above the current spot price.
negatives: Debt/Equity ratio of 162.89 is high, indicating substantial leverage.
Price/Book (68.54) and Price/Sales (26.25) ratios suggest a premium valuation.
Beta of 2.37 indicates higher volatility compared to the broader market.

news.paragraph: AppLovin Corporation (APP) is seeing increased attention with a report highlighting Fortnite's potential return to the App Store, which could put Apple's services model under a spotlight. This comes as the company, also known as Trump Media, moves significant capital amid unrealized losses. Investors are also noting the stock's trending status and upcoming earnings report.

headlines.title: Trump Media moves $205 million amid mounting unrealized losses
